name: Chicken Taco Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the chopped onion in butter.
2. Add the chopped chilies, tomato juice, and cheddar cheese soup to the pan.
3. Stir in the chili powder and garlic powder.
4. Add the chopped cooked chicken.
5. Break the tortillas into about 6 pieces each.
6. Layer the ingredients in a baking dish: start with a layer of tortilla pieces, followed by a layer of the chicken mixture, and then a layer of grated cheese.
7. Repeat the layers until all ingredients are used.
8. Cover the casserole and bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes.
9. Uncover the dish and sprinkle additional grated cheese on top.
10. Continue baking until the cheese is melted.
11. Serves approximately 8 people.
